Deepen or connect?i
Deepening assumptions ▸

Reality check against built projectsi
Add resident codes
Paste codes sent in by residents — one per line or separated by spaces. Duplicates are skipped.
Evidence tiers
Lab — laboratory analysis or pump test
Driller — completion report or driller's log
Owner — well owner's own account
Expert — local expert estimate
Public — DWR / State Water Board record
Tier sets interpolation weight, not truth. A recollection that a well went dry is evidence; it is simply weighted below a lab result.i
Use in model
Switch off to see the model on public data alone. The difference is the contribution of local knowledge — visible, not baked in.
Quality constraint
Boron and nitrate are mapped from observations, not modelled. Thresholds differ by use — drinking water and irrigation are not the same limit.i
Layers
Scenarios ▸
Import merges, it does not overwrite. Collect files from several people and import them one after another — observations accumulate, duplicates are skipped. A scenario captures the whole chain — decline, aquifer, build-out and costs. Export writes a JSON file you keep; import it into any later version to restore your work.
Jacobs study overlays ▸
Align —
Data & method ▸
465 valley-floor dwellings — Mendocino Assessor parcels joined to building footprints, one dwelling per developed parcel.
116 wells with tested yield, depth, static level and perforated interval — DWR OSWCR, section-centroid located, used as a capability sample.
37 miles of road — OpenStreetMap centrelines, carrying the mains.
Basin — DWR Bulletin 118 Potter Valley (1-051), 8,243 ac.
Calibration — Jacobs 2025 Potter Valley Water Supply Reliability Study (PVIFM groundwater budget).

A screen for prioritising investigation, not a design: uniform aquifer properties, worst-case simultaneous pumping, no pressure zones or terrain lift, planning-level unit costs, and existing Potter Valley CSD service is not deducted.
Basin integrityi
Every hydrogeologic layer is clipped to the alluvial basin: 0 of 465 homes, 0 of 116 capability wells and 0 of 42 well markers fall outside it. 296 hillside wells and 292 hillside dwellings are excluded, and the hex grid is masked to the basin so the interpolated surface never renders beyond its data.
Community input
Click a home to check or correct it. Use Add a well for a well that is not at a home.i
